title: ABO Blood Typing Interactive Simulator
description: Interpret agglutination reactions with Anti-A, Anti-B, and Anti-D antisera to determine the ABO/Rh type of a mystery blood sample.
creator: Forensic Science Intelligent Textbook
subject: Forensic Science
Forensic Serology
Blood Typing
ABO Blood Group
Agglutination
bloomLevel: Understand (L2) — interpret agglutination results to determine blood type.
chapter_title: Forensic Serology and Biological Fluid Analysis

learningObjectives: Interpret agglutination patterns to determine ABO blood type.
Connect a positive antiserum reaction to a specific red-cell antigen.
Explain the reaction patterns of Type O and Type AB blood.
educational.prerequisites: Basic idea of antigens and antibodies

pedagogical.interactionPattern: Predict-Test-Observe: select mystery sample, add antisera, observe agglutination, predict type, reveal
pedagogical.assessment: Students predict the blood type from the +/- reaction pattern before revealing the answer
pedagogical.modelType: Rule-based reaction simulation with animated agglutination
